LexiCoil
← Back to LexiCoil

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026. Contact: contact@lexicoil.com

LexiCoil helps you practise English and German official-style exams. This policy explains what data we collect and why.

1. Data we collect

  • Account data - name, email address, authentication identifiers (via Supabase when enabled).
  • Learning data - flashcards, exam history, saved exams, answers you submit (synced to our servers when you are signed in).
  • Usage and quota - exam generation counts, plan (guest / free / Pro), payment status via Stripe.
  • Technical data - IP address (for guest quota and rate limiting), browser type, cookies/local storage on your device.
  • AI processing - exam text and your speaking/writing answers may be sent to Anthropic's API to generate or evaluate content. We do not sell this data.

2. How we use your data

  • Provide and improve the LexiCoil service.
  • Sync your vocabulary and exam history across devices.
  • Enforce usage quotas and process payments.
  • Send transactional emails (account confirmation, password reset).

3. Third parties

We use Supabase (auth/database), Stripe (payments), Netlify (hosting), and Anthropic (AI). Each has its own privacy policy.

4. Your rights

You may request access, correction, or deletion of your account data by emailing contact@lexicoil.com.

5. Cookies and local storage

LexiCoil does not use advertising or third-party marketing cookies today. We store the following in your browser for essential (functional) operation only. Optional analytics or marketing tools are not loaded unless you accept them in the cookie banner.

  • Session / authentication — HTTP-only cookies and JWT tokens keep you signed in securely (Supabase auth). Duration: until you sign out or the session expires.
  • Exam and flashcard state — localStorage saves your in-progress exams, saved exams, flashcards, goals, and mastery data so you can continue where you left off. Duration: until you clear site data or delete your account.
  • Preferences — theme (theme / lc_theme) and similar UI settings. Duration: persistent until cleared.
  • Cookie consent — lc_cookie_consent remembers your choice (Accept / Reject / Preferences). Duration: until you clear site data or change preferences.
  • Guest quota — a functional identifier may be stored to enforce fair usage limits for unsigned visitors.

Legal basis (EU/CH): essential storage is necessary to provide the service you request (GDPR Art. 6(1)(b)). Any future analytics or marketing scripts would rely on your consent (Art. 6(1)(a)) and load only after you choose Accept or enable them in Preferences.

You can reopen cookie settings anytime via the footer link in the app (when signed in) or by clearing lc_cookie_consent in your browser to see the banner again.

6. Changes

We may update this policy. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
